![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

__Title: __Unconquerable soul

__Medium: __Acrylic on canvas

__Size: __ 48ΓÇ¥ x 66ΓÇ¥

__Year of Production: __ 2018

UNCONQUERABLE SOUL

Anybody who takes birth on this earth, according to time and situation he/she starts to grow and develop and starts taking the responsibility\. While taking the responsibility, his/her soul mobilizes him/ her\. In this process the same soul sometimes takes the form of god sometimes demon\. In the same way, I have taken my mind as the god to move forward\. In the process of moving forward, I have shown the god dancing on me\. I believe that our soul is god\. We cannot conquer it, and the soul never dies\.  In this painting, I have used the motifs of Nepali painting \(Thanka\)\. I have been making the paintings by mixing the contemporary thoughts and traditional Thanka paintings

![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

__Title: __Tudaal

__Medium: __Acrylic on canvas

__Size: __ 30ΓÇ¥ x 40ΓÇ¥

__Year of Production: __ 2018

TUNDAAL

As we all know that while constructing a temple we make a roof\. To give support to the roof we put wooden pole in a slanting way on four sides\. That slanting wooden pole is called Tundal\. That Tundal is new at first\. We carve the statues of various forms of gods and goddesses in different positions on it\. Though it is new and strong at first, it slowly becomes old and weak due to time and situation\. One day, there forms cracks on the wooden poles, turn into pieces, unknowingly get destroyed and vanish from the earth\. In the same way, our human body also vanishes from the earth by becoming old and weak\. 

After the birth of a baby on this earth, he/she learns, receives knowledge becomes perfect by nature, but unknowingly like the Tundal of the temple, our human body also gets stoop, old, weak and the existence vanishes from the earth\. It shows that, nothing remains same forever\. One day everything disappear\. This is the law of nature\.

![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

__Title: __Inner Power

__Medium: __Acrylic on canvas

__Size: __ 24ΓÇ¥ x 30ΓÇ¥

__Year of Production: __ 2020

INNER POWER

As we all know that the universe is created by God\. And the God has created human beings and other creatures on this earth \.The human beings have created and discovered many things\. There is a relation between God, human beings and the scientific inventions and discoveries\. Everything in this universe is running smoothly by the grace of the God \.Though human beings and scientific inventions have their own power but they cannot overcome and challenge the power of God \.So they have to accept the creation of God\. Science can never succeed without the blessing of God \.Therefore, we should show respect and devotion to the inner power of god\. The nature itself is God\.

![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

__Title: __A New World

__Medium: __Acrylic on canvas

__Size: __ 60ΓÇ¥ x 72ΓÇ¥

__Year of Production: __ 2020

__A New World__

This  painting is made by imagining about the new world \.Now the technology has reached the top and has made robots of different kinds\. Robot has started doing all the works that humans do\. A robot does a variety of works like cooking ,lifting heavy loads ,guarding a house carrying medicines at hospital etc \.Beside these other different types of model of robots are also being made\. Such as bee, housefly, butterfly etc which have been doing work since long \.In the future ,the number of robots will increase rapidly more than the population of human being and this present world will turn into the world of robotic age\. In the days to come, the robots will be able to bear children like human being by keeping sexual intercourse with human being and will reach to that level\. From this I was influenced and studied deeply about this subject matter and felt the beginning of the new era and made this painting\. I have shown not only human beings, robots and natural insects as well\. Because of this situation the coming generation will be affected greatly so we shouldnot let robots to take the place of human being \.We should be careful about it\.

![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

__Title: __Effects of Artificial World

__Medium: __Acrylic on canvas

__Size: __ 36ΓÇ¥ x 48ΓÇ¥

__Year of Production: __ 2021

__Effects of Artificial World__

People need the environment around them to survive\. People get chance to learn a lot from the same environment\. But people are also destroying the same environment \.The natural creatures around us like animals insects, trees, plants etc are gradually disappearing due to us\. And these extinct animals will not be seen by our descendants \.But due to the high development of science in the world various living beings are created by science and technology\. The same artificial creatures have started to take the place of natural creatures\.

	The mobile phone, we use is also becoming very dear to us\. Life without mobile is very difficult \.Because everything is available on mobile \.After a while, another new invention is made\. That too will become just as popular\.

If the same situation happens, I think that in a short time, artificial goods will cause great damage to the world market\. Since the same artificial objects are used a lot, I have also created pictures using artificial animals in my painting\.
